video_title: Ricardo Lopez performs China's National Anthem "March of the Volunteers" Dec 7, 2014
desc_head:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Ricardo Lopez performs China's National Anthem "March of the Volunteers" written by Tian Han
Piano Accompaniment by Brent Bedford

English Translation:
Arise! All those who refuse to be slaves!
Let our flesh and blood forge our new Great Wall!
The Chinese nation has arrived at its most perilous time.
Every person is forced to expel his very last roar.
Arise! Arise! Arise!
One million hearts beating as one,
Brave the enemy's fire, March on!
Brave the enemy's fire, March on!
March on! March on! On!

video_title: Ben Deniston on what is Mankind?  Dec 7th, 2014
desc_head:
New England Schiller Institute Conference - December 7th, 2014

Ben Deniston from 21st Century Science and Technology Magazine, on the critical question, what is Mankind? And what is the difference between man and animal?  And how this relates to the need for the United States to collaborate with Russia, China, and India on scientific defense of humanity.
